scripts.build:dev: npm run sync:extension-version && electrobun build && npm run postbuild:extension
scripts.build:mac: npm run sync:extension-version && electrobun build --env=stable && npm run postbuild:extension
scripts.test: npm run test:js && npm run test:python
scripts.acceptance:mac:auto: npm run check && npm run build:mac && npm run smoke:mac && npm run smoke:mac:startup-time && npm run smoke:mac:port-conflict && npm run smoke:mac:autostart && npm run smoke:mac:login-autostart && npm run smoke:mac:first-run && npm run smoke:mac:extension-health && npm run smoke:chrome-extension-load && npm run smoke:mac:menu-visible && npm run smoke:mac:release && npm run check:release-artifacts
scripts.test:coverage: node --experimental-test-coverage --test-coverage-lines=70 --test-coverage-branches=65 --test-coverage-functions=70 --test app/tests/*.test.ts extension/tests/*.test.js scripts/*.test.mjs tests/*.js && node --experimental-test-coverage --test-coverage-include='app/core/**' --test-coverage-lines=90 --test-coverage-branches=70 --test-coverage-functions=85 --test app/tests/*.test.ts && node --experimental-test-coverage --test-coverage-include='extension/job_client.js' --test-coverage-lines=85 --test extension/tests/bookmarks_job.test.js extension/tests/job-recovery.test.js
